subject: Re: Stan Pottinger
body:
i appreciate it

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

>  Dear Jeff:
>     It's been awhile since we've seen each other,
> but reading about the
> excesses of the Palm Beach cops, I had to drop you a
> line of support.
>     Sooner or later, anyone who does anything
> worthwhile in the world is
> going to kick a junkyard dog or two and make them
> snarl.  The small minded
> of the world don't like thinkers and doers,
> especially when they succeed.
>     But this, too, shall pass.  And I hope it passes
> quickly.  You have
> friends and a sense of humor, and that's 90% of the
> ballgame.  So hang in
> there.
>     I look forward to seeing you around town one day
> and hearing the funny
> side of this thing.
>     Best wishes,
>     Stan
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
i appreciate it

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Jeff:
It's been awhile since we've seen each other,
but reading about the
excesses of the Palm Beach cops, I had to drop you a
line of support.
Sooner or later, anyone who does anything
worthwhile in the world is
going to kick a junkyard dog or two and make them
snarl. The small minded
of the world don't like thinkers and doers,
especially when they succeed.
But this, too, shall pass. And I hope it passes
quickly. You have
friends and a sense of humor, and that's 90% of the
ballgame. So hang in
there.
I look forward to seeing you around town one day
and hearing the funny
side of this thing.
Best wishes,
Stan
